sections.title: 第 3 页
sections.text:
Get ready!

Think: What can we do at the weekend?

Listen and say.

- go jogging
- go fishing
- do chores
- watch TV
- play with friends
- have a picnic

Learn:
- go jogging
- go fishing

Think and complete:
- play with friends

sections.title: 第 4 页
sections.text:
**PREVIEW**

Read and write.

I'm Li Sha. Today is Saturday. I have a busy weekend. In the morning, I do chores with my family. I clean my bedroom and walk my dog. In the afternoon, I have a painting class. Then I play basketball with my friends. After dinner, I read a story to my brother.

In the morning:
I have a busy day.

In the afternoon:
In the evening:

Circle these words in "Weekend plans" and guess.
early  catch

**Answer the question before you read.**
What do you usually do at the weekend?

sections.title: 第 5 页
sections.text:
Explore

Weekend plans

People do fun activities at the weekend. What are these children going to do this weekend?

This weekend, I'm going to go jogging with my family in the park. We must get up early on Sunday morning and warm up. It's going to be fun!
- Li Sha

This weekend, my dad and I are going to go fishing at Blue Lake. I can't wait to catch more fish than my dad!
- Luo Jie

sections.title: 第 6 页
sections.text:
I'm going to have a picnic with my family this weekend. We can fly a kite in the park. Hurry up. Saturday!

Fong Xioo

Do you have any plans for the weekend?


What are these children's weekend plans?

can catch     go jog

sections.title: 第 7 页
sections.text:
Read and complete.

People do fun activities
at the weekend.

Read again and say.
Can you talk about the children's weekend plans?

Li Sha is going to go jogging with
her family this weekend. They're
going to get up early and warm up.

 Think What is your plan for this weekend?

sections.title: 第 8 页
sections.text:
```
Grammar
in use
Listen and chant.
We are happy at the weekend

It's the weekend. I'm so glad.
I'm going to go fishing with my dog.

It's the weekend. Mum's so happy.
She's going to draw a picture of our cat, Tobby.

It's the weekend. The weather is great.
We're going to go jogging on Sunday at eight.

Learn
I am going to go fishing this weekend.
He / She is going to play basketball this weekend.
We are going to have a picnic this weekend.

Look and say.
Here are the weekend plans of Peter's family. Can you talk about their plans?

Our weekend plans           Peter and his dad are going
Dad and I: go fishing          to go fishing this weekend.
Mum: watch TV
My sister: play with friends
Grandma: do gardening
Grandpa: do tai chi
```

sections.title: 第 9 页
sections.text:
**Communicate**

**Listen and number, Then say.**

**Weekend plans**

What are the children's weekend plans?

Zhang Qi is going to have a picnic with his family this weekend.
Zhu Li is going to ...

Think: How can you make your weekend special?

sections.title: 第 10 页
sections.text:
Wow! Your weekend life looks fun. What's Robot Day?
On this day, I'm going to make a robot with my friends.

sections.title: 第 11 页
sections.text:
Extend

A busy Sunday

Dad: Today is a busy day! We're all going to do chores.
Mum: Xiaoliang, you're going to wash the dishes, Xiaoyue, you're going to dust the shelves. I'm going to clean the windows.
Dad: And I'm going to water the plants and walk the dog.

Xiaoliang: Why are you using a newspaper, Mum?
Mum: It makes the window shine and clean!
Xiaoliang: That's amazing!

sections.title: 第 12 页
sections.text:
Xiaoyue: I can't do this, the dust is going everywhere!
Dad: Xiaoyue, use this.
Xiaoyue: Thanks, Dad.

----

Xiaoyue: Dad, when does a plant need water?
Dad: You must feel the soil. Does it feel dry?
Xiaoyue: Yes, it does!
Dad: Then it needs water.

----

Dad: Now where's the lead?
Xiaoyue: Look, Dad!
Dad: Clever dog! Bye!
Xiaoyue: Bye!

sections.title: 第 13 页
sections.text:
**Read, match and say.**

----

**Dad waters the plants.**
He also ..

----

**OThink**
Do you do chores at the weekend? What do you usually do?

----

**Think more about the Big Question**
**What do we do at the weekend?**
We do sport.
We play with friends.
We do chores with our family.

---
